HOME.NAME: Niranjan Abathurai
HOME.ABOUT: I architect dynamic, high-performance web applications that merge clean code with exceptional user experiences.. From translating complex Figma designs into pixel-perfect UIs to building secure, multi-language platforms

CONTACT.HEADING: Feel free to drop a message

JOB_1.DESCRIPTION_1: Spearheaded the end-to-end development of a modern web application from scratch using Angular 19 and 20, engineering a custom AI agent to autonomously generate complete frontend codebases from Figma UI designs.
JOB_1.DESCRIPTION_2: Implemented dynamic multi-language support and secure user intake workflows featuring concurrent file uploads and Google reCAPTCHA bot protection.
JOB_1.DESCRIPTION_3: Working on the development of a new SAP Spartacus storefront project with Angular 17, including building and deploying the codebase in non-prod environments using SAP commerce cloud.
JOB_1.DESCRIPTION_4: Developing responsive UI features according to Figma designs that support mobile, tablet, and desktop views to ensure cross-platform visual consistency.
JOB_1.DESCRIPTION_5: Worked on complex registration forms using reactive forms, implemented Signals for auto-updating changes, and utilized @media queries for handling the responsiveness of the application.

JOB_2.DESCRIPTION_1: Working on the development of new SAP Spartacus store front project with Angular 17 version.
JOB_2.DESCRIPTION_2: Developing responsive UI features according to the Figma designs that support mobile, tablet and desktop view.
JOB_2.DESCRIPTION_3: Worked on registration form using reactive forms, Signals for auto updating changes and @media queries for handling responsiveness of the application.
JOB_2.DESCRIPTION_4: Having hands-on experience in building and deploying the codebase in non-prod environment using SAP commerce cloud.

JOB_3.DESCRIPTION_1: Worked on creating a user interactive web application where user upload images and process them in OCR and display the data.
JOB_3.DESCRIPTION_2: Created responsive modal dialog with multiple table to add data and validations which will generate and download a report.
JOB_3.DESCRIPTION_3: Have work experience in creating API using spring boot java and do CRUD operations in non-sql mongoDB collections.
JOB_3.DESCRIPTION_4: Also build and deployed the codebase in IT and UAT using Rio and spinnaker tools.

JOB_4.DESCRIPTION_1: Migrating an existing application to Angular 8 project and also optimizing performance of the application.
JOB_4.DESCRIPTION_2: Worked on multiple angular features like Pipes, Directives, Route guards, Lazy loading modules and so on.
JOB_4.DESCRIPTION_3: Creating and integrating API using HTTP modules with the help of Rxjs operators and Ngrx store concepts.
JOB_4.DESCRIPTION_4: Also worked on ag-grid modules for adding grid data and displaying in simpler format.
